data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. GUACAMOLE IRISH wasn't far away at the finish when 4th and beaten only one length (16.91) at this track. Better than last start and worth following up. 4. DESTINI PALADIN was strongly fancied last time on the back of some superb recent form, including a two-run winning streak, but could only manage sixth (17.08) at this track. Comes through a solid form race last start. Can figure in the finish. 1. BINGO DASH was safely held in tougher company last start after drifting back at Bendigo, but prior to that won by 0.8 lengths at Bendigo (24.30) beating Cosmic Reward in a Grade 5 on January 21. Comes out of a hot form race last start. Better than last start and can bounce back. 2. SKY BLAZER made it two minor placings on the trot when beaten third (23.31) in a Grade 5 at Warragul last time out.","runners":[3,4,1,2],"exclusive":false}
